name: wide_input_port_with_large_bit_range
description: Code should include a wide input port declaration with a large non-zero-based bit range such as [83:10] or similar. This creates many intermediate wires during synthesis that stress the AUTONAME pass scoring mechanism.

name: division_chain_in_combinational_block
description: Code should include chained division operations in a combinational always block, such as b / e / c. These operations generate multiple intermediate division results that produce high wire rename scores.

name: division_result_in_if_condition
description: Code should include a division result used as an if condition, such as if (d / g). This pattern triggers complex wire naming during the AUTONAME pass.

name: mixed_blocking_and_nonblocking_in_same_always
description: Code should include both blocking (=) and non-blocking (<=) assignments to the same variable (g) within a single combinational always block. This creates conflicting assignments that generate many intermediate wires.
